options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <partitionName {list}> # Specifies list of partition names

options.name: -addPinForPGWireLayersInDistance
options.description: {{layer1 X1} {layer2 X2}} Specifies the layers and distance to consider for creating pins on pg-stripes

options.name: -inputNetsForWireDistribution
options.description: Specifies file containing net names to use for wire distribution

options.name: -noInheritPhysical
options.description: Physical cells are not pushed down into the partition

options.name: -noTopPushDown
options.description: Nothing is pushed down on layers reserved for top design

options.name: -noViaCutSpace
options.description: Do not cut cell obstruction aorund vias

options.name: -pushDownHonorInsidePinForSpecialNet
options.description: Push down selected PG routes as route blockage into the partition

options.name: -pushDownSelectedPGBump
options.description: Push down selected PG bumps into the partition

options.name: -pushDownSelectedPGWiresAsRouteBlockage
options.description: Push down selected PG routes as route blockage into the partition

options.name: -pushDownSpecialNetAsObs
options.description: Specifies list of special Nets, which will be pushed down as routing blockage

options.name: -pushRoute
options.description: Push down hierarchical correct signal routes

options.name: -pushdownAllBumps
options.description: pushdown all bump to partition block

options.name: -skipRouteBlockagesOutsidePartition
options.description: Skips pushing of objects which are close to partition fence.

options.name: -tcf
options.description: Enable tcf writing for the block
